title: set_len without capacity bounds check after FFI: latent UB
description: ecc.rs sign_digest, public_key_der, ecdh and rsa.rs public_key_der all call buf.set_len(returned_len) after FFI with no assertion that returned_len <= buf.capacity(). If the wolfHSM server misbehaves and writes back a length larger than the capacity hint we passed in, set_len triggers immediate UB (setting len > capacity). Fix: before set_len, check returned_len <= cap and return ProtocolError if violated.
